languages.text: Самодельные дома напоминают лачуги на нижних палубах корабля.
These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.
languages.original_text: Самодельные дома напоминают лачуги на нижних палубах корабля.

traits.locale_text: These crude dwellings resemble shanties of the lower decks.
These crude dwellings resemble shanties of the lower decks.
These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.
These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.

languages.text: 这些粗陋的住所，看着跟舰船下层甲板的窝棚一个样。
languages.original_text: These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.

traits.locale_text: 这些粗陋的住所，看着跟舰船下层甲板的窝棚一个样。

languages.text: Bu derme çatma evler, geminin alt güvertelerindeki gecekondulara benziyor.
languages.original_text: These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.

traits.locale_text: Bu derme çatma evler, geminin alt güvertelerindeki gecekondulara benziyor.

languages.text: Ces habitations rudimentaires ressemblent aux masures que l'on trouve sur les ponts inférieurs du vaisseau.
languages.original_text: These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.

traits.locale_text: Ces habitations rudimentaires ressemblent aux masures que l'on trouve sur les ponts inférieurs du vaisseau.

languages.text: Estas viviendas rudimentarias son similares a las chozas de las cubiertas inferiores de la nave.
languages.original_text: These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.

traits.locale_text: Estas viviendas rudimentarias son similares a las chozas de las cubiertas inferiores de la nave.

languages.text: Diese primitiven Behausungen erinnern an die Barracken auf den unteren Decks des Schiffes.
languages.original_text: These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.

traits.locale_text: Diese primitiven Behausungen erinnern an die Barracken auf den unteren Decks des Schiffes.

languages.text: これらの粗末な住居は、艦の下層デッキのあばら家を思わせる。
languages.original_text: These crude dwellings resemble the shanties on the lower decks of the ship.

traits.locale_text: これらの粗末な住居は、艦の下層デッキのあばら家を思わせる。
